nodes.name: Fall of Constantinople
nodes.description: The Ottoman Empire conquers Constantinople, ending the Byzantine Empire.

preventionConditions.description: Byzantium is strong enough to resist

nodes.narrativePrompt: Describe the fall of Constantinople to the Ottoman Turks.

nodes.name: End of the Hundred Years' War
nodes.description: France and England sign peace, ending the long conflict.
nodes.narrativePrompt: Describe the end of the Hundred Years' War between France and England.

nodes.name: Age of Exploration Begins
nodes.description: European powers begin exploring the Atlantic and beyond.
nodes.narrativePrompt: Describe the beginning of the Age of Exploration as Portuguese sailors venture further into the unknown.
